zh.lifeSummary: 當Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandre於大約0961年出生在法國福藍德 福藍薩時，他的父親Baudouin III comte de Flandre29歲，母親Mathilde Billung von Sachsen21歲。他於0976年與Rosala Suzanne d' Ivree結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於0987年3月30日在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年27歲，埋葬在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandre于大约0961年出生在法国福藍德 福藍薩时，他的父亲Baudouin III comte de Flandre29岁，母亲Mathilde Billung von Sachsen21岁。他于0976年与Rosala Suzanne d' Ivree结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于0987年3月30日在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年27岁，埋葬在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特。

nameMeanings.name: Arnoul

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Patrice, Pierre.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Jeune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jean
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandre was born about 0961, in French Flanders, France, his father, Baudouin III comte de Flandre, was 29 and his mother, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, was 21. He married Rosala Suzanne d' Ivree in 0976. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 30 March 0987, in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 27, and was buried in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandre est né environ 0961, à Flandre française, France, son père, Baudouin III comte de Flandre, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Rosala Suzanne d' Ivree en 0976. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 mars 0987, à Gand, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Gand, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandre um 0961 in Flandre française, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin III comte de Flandre 29 und seine Mutter Mathilde Billung von Sachsen 21. Er hat 0976 Rosala Suzanne d' Ivree geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. März 0987 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien und wurde in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandre è nato il circa 0961 nel Flandre française, Francia, il suo padre, Baudouin III comte de Flandre, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Rosala Suzanne d' Ivree nel 0976. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 marzo 0987, nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandreが約0961年にフランスフランダー フランcアイゼで生まれた時，父Baudouin III comte de Flandreは29歳，母Mathilde Billung von Sachsenは21歳であった。0976年にRosala Suzanne d' Ivreeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は0987年3月30日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで27歳で死去し，ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandre(이)가 대략 0961년 프랑스 플랜드르 프랜c아이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin III comte de Flandre(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde Billung von Sachsen(은)는 21세였다. 그는 0976년 Rosala Suzanne d' Ivree(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0987년 3월 30일 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandre nasceu aproximadamente 0961, em Flandre française, França, seu pai, Baudouin III comte de Flandre, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Rosala Suzanne d' Ivree em 0976. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de março de 0987, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandre родился около 0961 г. в местности фландр франcеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Baudouin III comte de Flandre было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Rosala Suzanne d' Ivree в 0976 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 марта 0987 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Arnoul II le Jeune comte de Flandre nació aproximadamente 0961, en Flandre française, Francia, su papá, Baudouin III comte de Flandre, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Rosala Suzanne d' Ivree en 0976. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de marzo de 0987, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultado en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica.
